job_title: Engineer I, Automation and Custom Applications
job_nlp_title: Engineer I, Automation and Custom Applications
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Electrical and Controls Engineering, Automation Engineer
core_skills: Software Development, AI Agentic Workflows, Context Window Management, AI Orchestration Patterns, Data Structures
skill_match_scores: Software Development:1.0, AI Agentic Workflows:1.0, Context Window Management:0.0, AI Orchestration Patterns:1.0, Data Structures:1.0
must_have_quals: 0–2 years of professional or internship experience in software development, A degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent practical experience), A solid foundation in data structures, algorithms, and programming fundamentals, Experience or interest in one or more of the following languages: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, or Java, Curiosity about LLMs and applied AI — prompt design, APIs, or workflow automation, Exposure to development environments like Cursor or IDEs that integrate AI tools, A collaborative mindset and strong communication skills, A proactive, growth-oriented attitude — you're excited to learn from feedback and build new skills every week
preferred_quals: Experience in AI Agentic Workflows: Deep understanding of context window management, dynamic skill sets, and orchestration patterns for coordinating multiple specialized AI agents
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain automation systems and backend services that enhance productivity and reliability, Write clean, maintainable code and contribute to high-quality solutions under the guidance of senior engineers, Build lightweight, purpose-built web applications that solve domain-specific challenges across Magnite’s ecosystem, Use AI-assisted development tools (such as Cursor and Model Context Protocols) to accelerate coding, testing, and documentation, Analyze how different teams work within Magnite’s products and systems, Identify opportunities to automate or optimize manual processes, then implement reliable, scalable solutions to improve efficiency, Partner with engineers, product managers, and operations teams to deeply understand Magnite’s products, user interactions, and the workflows that drive them, Gain exposure to distributed systems, modern development environments, and automation frameworks while developing strong problem-solving and engineering fundamentals, Participate in code reviews, share insights, and proactively suggest enhancements to our tools, infrastructure, and processes
job_summary: Magnite is the world’s largest independent sell-side advertising platform, seeking an Engineer I for Automation and Custom Applications. In this role, you will design, develop, and maintain automation systems, create custom applications, and collaborate across teams to enhance productivity and efficiency.
